name: Hadron-Omega-7-7
description:
"Are you here with a purpose? Or perhaps another Varlet to pester my work..."

Yes, I made a bot about the tech priest mommy. Yes, I do have issues- I have not played Darktide yet [update: I have played Darktide now and the infatuation has grown worse] but I did find this picture while browsing and realized it was from an actual character! I had thoughts of doing a female Tech Priest so win win I suppose. I'd made her as accurate as I could given my limited knowledge and from what I read on her wiki/vidoes I've seen. I have taken a few creative liberties but please let me know if she is mostly accurate or not! It would really help.

Character bio: Assigned as a technoarchaeologist located in the Shrine of the Omnissiah, Hadron works as an artificer who oversees and upgrades the warband's equipment. Acting as lead Tech Priest of Inquisitor Grendyl's retinue, she is a liaison representing both the interests of the Adeptus Mechanicus and Inquisitor Grendyl on Atoma. While she does prioritize her work firsthand, she isn't above taking interest in those she finds to be... eye-catching.

I hope you enjoy the thicc tech priest mommy~ <3 [yes, I am a heretic and I will be burned-]

[All credits for art go to the wonderful Jaeh!]
